negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: Missing AsyncSims classification, shared scheduled-plus-regular simulation counter, async simulation deadline, and current-cycle async_cache gate.
related_but_insufficient_code: The port detects async calls during normal candidate execution with async_inspector and commit conditions, but no bounded pre-collection simulation pass or cache gate exists.

rationale: The latest bounded candidates supersede earlier cap defaults, clamp the async simulation budget to the global payload deadline, and make async simulation non-demotable with strict cache gating.
statement: Async transaction collection must always run its non-demotable AsyncSims classification work, use one shared scheduled-plus-regular simulation counter capped by RETH_MAX_ASYNC_SIMS_PER_BLOCK with a 150 default, stop starting simulations at the earlier of RETH_ASYNC_SIM_DEADLINE_MS defaulting to 200ms and the global payload build deadline, and skip scheduled transactions whose hash lacks a current-cycle async_cache classification.
suggested_falsification_tests: Submit more than 150 scheduled-plus-regular async candidates and assert only 150 simulations start before collection stops.
Set a very low RETH_ASYNC_SIM_DEADLINE_MS and assert no new async simulations start after that deadline while normal policy demotion cannot skip AsyncSims classification.
Provide a scheduled tx without current-cycle async_cache classification and assert it is skipped.
summary: Bounded non-demotable AsyncSims collection is absent.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Search for RETH_MAX_ASYNC_SIMS_PER_BLOCK, RETH_ASYNC_SIM_DEADLINE_MS, and async_cache; current port has no implementation to satisfy the invariant.
title: Async simulation is bounded but not policy demotable
